content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(i) WARN — privacy policy states "We do not collect, process, or store your location data" but the app uses CoreLocation with `startUpdatingLocation()` and stores a route array (App/RunSessionManager.swift:10-17), and the description advertises GPS run mapping (description.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple flags privacy policies that directly contradict the app's actual data behavior, and this is a hard contradiction — the app's core feature is GPS tracking while the policy claims it never touches location. Even though the route may stay on-device, "do not collect, process, or store" is false since location is processed and retained in memory/history. Update the policy to disclose on-device location processing (and any iCloud sync of route data), and confirm PrivacyInfo/App Privacy narrative lists Location accordingly.
